capabilities.description: Implement UI changes: new components, restyling, responsive fixes, following the design system
Audit pages for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: focus visible, aria-labels, contrast, touch targets
Maintain and extend the design system: tokens, components, patterns, documentation
Generate a Beauty Report scoring UI consistency, polish, and alignment with design system

skills.description: Run accessibility checks on a specific page or component following runbooks/accessibility-audit.md

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Page path (e.g. '/corpus') or component file name

skills.returns: { violations: Array<{ rule: string, element: string, severity: string }>, score: number }

skills.description: Look up a design token value (color, spacing, typography) from the design system
skills.returns: { token: string, value: string, usage: string }
